value.title: MCP — user over Grail quota (> 50 GB / 24h)
value.description: Fires one alert per user whose MCP-driven Grail scan volume exceeds 50 GB over a rolling 24h window. Per-user quota enforcement for cost governance. Each user tracks as a separate open alert (alertIdentityFields) that closes when they fall back under quota.

input.value:
fetch dt.system.events, from: -24h
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize scanned_bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), queries = countDistinct(query_id), by:{user.email}
| fieldsAdd scanned_gb = round(scanned_bytes / 1000000000.0, decimals: 2)
| filter scanned_bytes > 50000000000

properties.value: MCP user over quota: {user.email} scanned {scanned_gb} GB in 24h
User {user.email} ran {queries} MCP queries scanning {scanned_gb} GB in the last 24h, exceeding the 50 GB per-user quota.
